name: attach_stick_gripper
description: Attaches a long stick-like geometry to the robot hand for hitting objects.
source_code:
async def attach_stick_gripper():
    return await attach_gripper(gripper_xml='<body name="stick" pos="0 0 0.11"><geom type="box" size="0.02 0.02 0.15" rgba="0.6 0.4 0.2 1" mass="0.1"/></body>', tcp_offset="0 0 0.25")
